name: HCL – Executive – 70 Posts
qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Tech/B.E, MBBS, PG Diploma

basic_details.job_title: Hindustan Copper HCL Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 70 Posts
basic_details.short_information: HCL Recruitment 2026 offers 70 vacancies for Executive posts. Eligible candidates with Bachelors Degree, B.Tech/B.E, MBBS, PG Diploma can apply online from 05-06-2026 to 25-06-2026 through the official HCL website, hindustancopper.com.
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via HCL website career section)

qualification.education_qualification: 1 Mark each, subject to maximum 2 Marks

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the HCL website career section (www.hindustancopper.com). No manual/paper applications will be entertained.
